title: Kandukondain Kandukondain Lyrics Kandukondain Kandukondain
stanzas:
Kandukondain Kandukondain
kadhal mugam Kandukondain
Kandukondain Kandukondain
viral thodum thoorathiley
vennilavu kandukondain

en kan paarthathu
en  kai serumo
kai seraamalae
kanneer serumo.

unnai thaediye
ini enadhu payanamo
endhan saalaigal
un veettil mudiyumo

ye kanavu mangaiye
unadhu manadhu
enadhu manadhil inaiyumo

nadhiyin thaedal
kadaisiyil kadal kaanbadhu.
uiyirin theadal
kadaisiyil unai kaanbadhu.

kadal konda nadhiyo
mugam thanai ilukkum.
naan unnil kalanthaal
pudhumugam kidaikkum.

natchathirangalai
oru naalil kattuven
endhan neramum
un kadhavu thattuven.

en kadhal dhevane
enadhu imaiyil
unadhu vizhigal mooduven

Kandukondain Kandukondain
kadhal mugam Kandukondain
viral thodum thoorathiley
vennilavu kandukondain

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kandukondain Kandukondain?

The song beautifully captures themes of love, longing, and the joy of discovery.

Who are the singers of Kandukondain Kandukondain?

The song is sung by Hariharan and Mahalakshmi Iyer.

Who composed the music for Kandukondain Kandukondain?

The music was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

What is the context of the song in the movie Kandukondain Kandukondain?

The song is set against a backdrop of romance, highlighting the characters' emotional journey.

When was the movie Kandukondain Kandukondain released?

The movie was released in the year 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Kandukondain Kandukondain' from the movie 'Kandukondain Kandukondain' is a beautiful expression of love and discovery. Sung by Hariharan and Mahalakshmi Iyer, it captures the essence of romance with soothing melodies composed by AR Rahman. The lyrics by Vairamuthu add depth and emotion, making it a perfect song for moments of reflection and joy. This classic duet evokes feelings of happiness and serenity, making it a timeless favorite for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kandukondain Kandukondain from the movie Kandukondain Kandukondain is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the magical voices of Hariharan and Mahalakshmi Iyer, and the genius of AR Rahman's music, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and melody. Dive into the enchanting world of romance with this unforgettable classic.
stanzaMeanings: I saw, I saw the face of love. I saw the moon close enough to touch.
When the moonlight falls and fills the bowl, it brings happiness.
If the moonlight breaks the bowl, it breaks a life.
Will my eyes meet what my hands touched? Will tears come without touching?
I saw, I saw the face of love.
The flower bed, the eyes plead, the heart fears, doesn't it?
The heart revives, her heart is your refuge, isn't it?
Will you open the door of your loneliness?
I saw, I saw the face of love.
When the clouds part, I see your face within.
When the flowers open, I hear your voice within.
Even when eyes open, dreams grow. Love's fingers open the art.
Is my journey now to find you? Will my paths end at your home?
Oh dream girl, will your heart join with mine?
I saw, I saw the face of love.
I saw the moon close enough to touch.
At the end of the river's search, it finds the sea. At the end of life's search, I find you.
The river that reached the sea pulls the face. If I merge with you, I find a new face.
One day, I will show you the stars. I will knock on your door every moment.
Oh my love god, I will close your eyes with my eyelids.
I saw, I saw the face of love. I saw the moon close enough to touch.
